scripts.package:mac: pnpm --filter @mauzai/shared build && pnpm --filter @mauzai/api build && node scripts/ensure-electron-runtime.mjs && electron-vite build && node scripts/package-macos.mjs
scripts.install:mac: node scripts/stop-macos.mjs && pnpm --filter @mauzai/shared build && pnpm --filter @mauzai/api build && node scripts/ensure-electron-runtime.mjs && electron-vite build && MAUZAI_APP_OUTPUT=/Applications/MauzAI.app node scripts/package-macos.mjs && node scripts/link-installed-macos.mjs
scripts.package:dmg:mac: pnpm --filter @mauzai/shared build && pnpm --filter @mauzai/api build && node scripts/ensure-electron-runtime.mjs && electron-vite build && MAUZAI_APP_OUTPUT=/tmp/mauzai-release/MauzAI.app node scripts/package-macos.mjs && MAUZAI_DMG_APP_PATH=/tmp/mauzai-release/MauzAI.app node scripts/create-dmg.mjs
